purpose: Primary owner of memory, consent, preferences and identity.
key_fields: user_id; demographics_optional; preferred_language; accessibility_needs; contact_preferences
privacy_safety_notes: Minimize sensitive demographics; no default institutional access.

purpose: Controls data import, sharing, cross-patient opt-in, caregiver access and revocation.
key_fields: scope_id; user_id; data_types; recipient; purpose; expiration; revoked_at; audit_log
privacy_safety_notes: All sharing explicit, user-initiated and revocable.

purpose: Immutable raw input from user, file, wearable, portal, bot, calendar or manual entry.
key_fields: raw_event_id; source_type; raw_payload_uri; timestamp; provenance; user_id; integrity_hash
source_or_evidence_refs: WellBe M03; non-negotiable raw context sacred
privacy_safety_notes: Never overwrite; redact only in derived views.

purpose: Document, image, portal result, lab report, note, SMS or export attached to the user's memory.
key_fields: document_id; raw_event_id; title; issuer; date; extracted_text; quality; verification_status
privacy_safety_notes: Provenance and quality labeling required.

purpose: Source-linked structured fact extracted from raw input.
key_fields: fact_id; source_id; fact_type; value; timestamp; confidence; evidence_quality; extracted_by
privacy_safety_notes: Every fact source-linked; hallucination prevention.

purpose: Generalized signal from symptoms, labs, wearables, medications, mood, lifestyle or context.
key_fields: signal_id; type; value; unit; time_window; baseline_relation; source_fact_ids
privacy_safety_notes: No isolated signal interpreted alone.

purpose: Patient-reported symptom occurrence with narrative and structured fields.
key_fields: episode_id; thread_id; symptom; onset; duration; severity; location; function_impact; raw_words
privacy_safety_notes: Patient-reported label preserved.

purpose: Living container for one unresolved or ongoing health concern.
key_fields: thread_id; user_id; title; start_date; status; uncertainty_level; summary; last_updated; closure_criteria
source_or_evidence_refs: Shared Health Memory Health Thread; Research F PI001
privacy_safety_notes: Do not set final diagnosis autonomously.

purpose: Links events, facts, documents, visits, labs, referrals and narratives to a Health Thread.
key_fields: link_id; thread_id; target_type; target_id; link_reason; confidence; user_confirmed; created_by
privacy_safety_notes: User can dispute/unlink inferred links.

purpose: Verbatim story, main fear, own theory, daily-life impact and correction history.
key_fields: narrative_id; thread_id; text; context; quote_type; created_at; correction_status
source_or_evidence_refs: Research F PI007; SHM Story Memory
privacy_safety_notes: Separate from clinician assessment; respectful wording.

purpose: Visit/contact/telehealth/ED/urgent-care event relevant to a thread.
key_fields: encounter_id; thread_id; setting; date; location; clinician_or_team; disposition; user_notes
source_or_evidence_refs: Research F schema Encounter; Research A patient flows
privacy_safety_notes: May be user-entered and unverified.

purpose: Lab, imaging, pathology, microbiology or other result with status and interpretation context.
key_fields: result_id; order_id; name; value; abnormal_flag; date; status; scope; reviewer; patient_notified
privacy_safety_notes: Avoid interpreting beyond test scope; abnormal flags need safe wording.

purpose: Referral lifecycle from recommendation/request through completion and returned advice.
key_fields: referral_id; thread_id; specialty; clinical_question; status; destination; due_date; appointment; outcome; next_owner
privacy_safety_notes: Status labels must be clear and not imply diagnosis exclusion.

purpose: Any open loop: result, referral, repeat test, check-in, appointment, document, message, or follow-up.
key_fields: pending_id; thread_id; item_type; description; due_date; owner_label; contact; status; escalation_hint
source_or_evidence_refs: Research F PI004/PI005/PI016; SHM Responsibility Memory
privacy_safety_notes: Owner may be unknown; do not invent ownership.

purpose: User-controlled clinician summary for a visit or referral.
key_fields: packet_id; thread_id; scope; generated_at; sections; source_links; share_grant_id; expiration
privacy_safety_notes: User preview and scope control before sharing.

purpose: Tracks what remains unknown, what test did/did not address, and what triggers reassessment.
key_fields: uncertainty_id; thread_id; question; status; source; review_needed; last_checked
source_or_evidence_refs: SHM Decision Memory; Research F uncertainty principles
privacy_safety_notes: No autonomous ruling out or confirming disease.

purpose: User-submitted correction to summary, thread, imported data, or plan interpretation.
key_fields: correction_id; target_id; correction_text; reason; status; created_at; shared_with
privacy_safety_notes: Preserve both original and correction.

purpose: Language, cost, transport, digital access, disability, trust or cultural safety barrier relevant to care path.
key_fields: barrier_id; thread_id; barrier_type; description; support_needed; user_share_flag
source_or_evidence_refs: Research F PI019-PI022; SHM Equity & Access Memory
privacy_safety_notes: Use for support, not risk-scoring stereotypes.

purpose: Rule-based triage/safety output before any user-facing AI response.
key_fields: flag_id; thread_id; level; trigger; message; dismissed_allowed; reviewed_at
privacy_safety_notes: No AI bypass; urgent guidance must be local and conservative.

purpose: Non-diagnostic question or possible relationship to explore.
key_fields: question_id; thread_id; question; supporting_evidence; missing_evidence; status; safety_review
privacy_safety_notes: Never present as diagnosis.
